response: The Q1 employee engagement survey shows an overall score of 7.8/10, surpassing the industry average of 7.2/10, with the highest rating in team collaboration at 8.9/10 and the lowest in career growth clarity at 6.1/10. To address these findings, the People Team proposes quarterly career conversations, an internal mobility program, and mentorship matching, which will be discussed at a town hall on Friday.
